principles: No rounded corners (Radius 0 defines the character)

button.primary: bg-[var(--bg-primary)] text-[var(--bg-primary-foreground)] rounded-none px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-semibold hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
button.secondary: bg-white text-[var(--text-primary)] border border-[var(--border-default)] rounded-none px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[var(--bg-canvas)] transition-colors
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-[var(--text-secondary)] rounded-none px-4 py-2 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-medium hover:text-[var(--text-primary)]

input.default: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[var(--border-default)] p-0 py-2 text-[var(--text-primary)] placeholder:text-[var(--text-tertiary)] focus:border-[var(--border-ring)] focus:outline-none rounded-none transition-colors

badge.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-none border border-[var(--border-default)] bg-[var(--bg-canvas)] px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-[var(--text-secondary)] tracking-wide
badge.secondary: inline-flex items-center rounded-none border border-[var(--border-default)] bg-[var(--bg-muted)] px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-[var(--text-tertiary)] tracking-wide
badge.outline: inline-flex items-center rounded-none border border-[var(--border-emphasis)] px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-[var(--text-secondary)] tracking-wide

table.header: border-b border-[var(--text-primary)] pb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-[var(--text-secondary)]
table.head: h-12 px-4 text-left align-middle text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-[var(--text-secondary)]
table.cell: py-4 pl-4 text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] font-medium group-hover:text-[var(--text-primary)] align-middle

toggle.label: relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer
toggle.wrapper: w-11 h-6 bg-[var(--bg-secondary)] peer-focus:outline-none rounded-none peer peer-checked:after:translate-x-full rtl:peer-checked:after:-translate-x-full peer-checked:after:border-white after:content-[''] after:absolute after:top-[2px] after:start-[2px] after:bg-white after:border-[var(--border-default)] after:border after:rounded-none after:h-5 after:w-5 after:transition-all peer-checked:bg-[var(--bg-primary)]

tabs.trigger: pb-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[var(--text-tertiary)] hover:text-[var(--text-primary)] border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-[var(--text-primary)] data-[state=active]:text-[var(--text-primary)] transition-colors

typography.eyebrow: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-[var(--text-secondary)] mb-2 block
typography.label: text-xs font-medium text-[var(--text-secondary)] uppercase tracking-wide
